creator: freebsd@zaziork.com
text:
Created attachment 169503
Patch: FreeBSD handbook ezjail chapter diff text file.

Patch to add a tip to the ezjail chapter to show how to configure ezjail to download packages over http rather than ftp. This is useful information to know in the event that FTP transfer fails whilst attempting to install a basejail for the first time (due to firewall restrictions, for example).

Patch included as attachment.
